zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)是(Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson和Janet Glendening的兒子，於1397年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯。他於1412年11月14日與(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1444年12月20日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)是(Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson和Janet Glendening的儿子，于1397年出生在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯。他于1412年11月14日与(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)在英国苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1444年12月20日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: Grierson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Kirkcudbrightshire): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier , a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ), + son. Compare Greer , with which some variation is evident among the early bearers, and compare Gregor and McGregor .

History: A Scottish family by the name of Grierson claim descent from Gilbert, a son of Malcolm MacGregor (died 1374), 11th Lord of MacGregor. Gilbert was known as both MacGregor and Gregorson. In 1400 he was granted lands by the Earl of March in the name Grierson. The numerous northern Irish bearers of the name Greer claim descent from this same Gilbert.

variants.name: Grier
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier, a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ). This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, especially Donegal, Antrim, and Longford.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) was born in 1397, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland as the son of (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson and Janet Glendening. He married (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) on 14 November 1412, in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 20 December 1444, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) est né en 1397, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, fils de (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson et Janet Glendening. Il a épousé (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) le 14 novembre 1412, à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1444, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) wurde 1397 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, als Sohn von (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson und Janet Glendening geboren. Er hat am 14. November 1412 in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1444 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) è nato il nel 1397 nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland come figlio di (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson e Janet Glendening. Lui sposato (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) il 14 novembre 1412, nel Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 20 dicembre 1444, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)は1397年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで(Nobleman) Gilbert GriersonとJanet Glendeningの息子として生まれた。1412年11月14日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアで(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1444年12月20日に故郷で47歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)(은)는 1397년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson(와)과 Janet Glendening의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1412년 11월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에서 (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1444년 12월 20일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에 묻혔다.

mn.Old Dunscore, Dumfrieshire, Scotland: Dunscore, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) nasceu em 1397, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland filho de (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson e Janet Glendening. Ele casou-se com (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) em 14 de novembro de 1412, em Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1444, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) родился в 1397 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson и Janet Glendening. Он женился на женщине по имени (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) 14 ноября 1412 г. в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 20 декабря 1444 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) nació en 1397, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland como hijo de (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson y Janet Glendening. Se casó con (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) el 14 de noviembre de 1412, en Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1444, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
